snippet: The first setup screen is fine, but the second step asking to connect data is confusing—we weren't sure which option to choose.
We need shareable links and comments so our team can discuss findings without hopping between tools.
SSO is a must-have. Security won't approve another login for 200+ users.
Performance is generally good, but we see slowdowns during our morning standup window around 9am ET.
Pricing feels unclear—what’s included at each tier and when we should upgrade?
We’d like a Jira integration to push issues directly from the app and track status back here.
We need audit logs for access and sharing events before we can roll out broadly.
Templates for common analyses would help us get value faster—we don’t want to start from a blank slate.
Notifications in Slack would help keep everyone looped in without emailing links around.
Reporting is too basic—we need weekly adoption breakdowns by team to justify renewals.
Step two in onboarding is where most of our new users drop; they ask support which data source to pick.
We’ll consider a paid pilot if you support SSO and basic role-based permissions out of the box.
